creator: mvh@ix.netcom.com
text:
Ummm - I didn't have a patch.  I fixed things in my GNUstep directory
but I don't know where the defaults are.

I can help _some_ if this is a big deal, I think it should be easy to
fix but I haven't done any patching before.

Let me know,

Mike Harding

   Date: Mon, 19 Apr 1999 10:16:30 -0600 (MDT)
   From: Brian Handy <handy@lambic.physics.montana.edu>
   Cc: freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.ORG
   X-files: The truth is out there
   Content-Type: TEXT/PLAIN; charset=US-ASCII
   X-SpamBouncer: 1.00h (4/18/99)
   X-SBClass: OK

   >Fix some paths in the config files via a patch?  Ideally the
   >defaults will be fixed so that if a user runs wmaker.inst again
   >it will be fixed up

   Your patch apparently didn't get attached to this email.  I'll 
   review it post-haste once you get it in the system.


   Brian
